project: apra-fleet #210 — Members stuck in busy state

tasks.title: Trace and document every exit path in execute-prompt.ts
tasks.notes: Added code comment block above inFlightAgents.add documenting all 7 exit paths. Verified inFlightAgents.delete and writeStatusline are in finally block.

tasks.title: Move writeStatusline() clear to finally block
tasks.notes: writeStatusline() moved to finally block (unconditional clear). Catch block now only marks offline for genuine SSH/network errors; cancellations clear to idle via finally.

tasks.title: VERIFY: Phase 1
tasks.notes: npm run build and npm test both passed. Phase 1 code review completed by fleet-rev.

tasks.title: Guard against PID-less cancellation leaving stale state
tasks.notes: Exported inFlightAgents from execute-prompt.ts. stop_prompt now unconditionally calls inFlightAgents.delete and writeStatusline regardless of PID.

tasks.title: Defend against re-dispatch race after stop_prompt
tasks.notes: stop_prompt polls inFlightAgents (50ms intervals, max 2s) after killing PID before returning, ensuring the finally block from the killed session has cleared before re-dispatch.

tasks.title: VERIFY: Phase 2
tasks.notes: npm run build and npm test both passed. Phase 1+2 cumulative code review completed by fleet-rev.

tasks.title: Unit tests for busy state clear on all exit paths
tasks.notes: Added describe('busy-state clear on all exit paths (T5)') to tests/execute-prompt.test.ts with 4 tests: success (exit=0), failure (exit=1), thrown exception, and AbortSignal. Each asserts inFlightAgents.has() is false and writeStatusline was called with no-arg clear. Mocked statusline module at test-file level.

tasks.title: Unit tests for stop_prompt busy-clear
tasks.notes: Added describe('stop_prompt busy-clear (T6)') to tests/stop-prompt.test.ts with 2 tests: (1) pid=none clears inFlightAgents and calls writeStatusline; (2) stop_prompt followed by executePrompt does not return 'already running' error. All 1052 tests pass.
